topic: Using Daily Transits Without Overcomplicating Your Day
learningGoal: User understands what Daily Transits are, where to find them, and how to apply them as a light-touch reflection tool.
keyPoints: Open Daily Transits from your Prime Self dashboard to see the current energy themes affecting the collective field
Use transits as context, not as fate: they describe pressure and possibility, not guaranteed outcomes
Compare today's transit themes with your own Blueprint so you can notice what feels amplified or sensitive
Choose one grounded action for the day: a conversation, a boundary, a work block, or rest
forbiddenClaims: predict exactly what will happen today
toneNotes: Clear and calming. Keep the user out of superstition and over-analysis. Emphasize experimentation, not dependency.
script:
Every day, the planets move.

They travel the same wheel of 64 gates your natal chart was drawn from — the same I Ching hexagram map that encoded your design at birth. When a transiting planet activates a gate, it brings that gate theme into the collective field.

This is what Daily Transits show you.

Not a prediction. A description of the energetic weather — the themes that are active today for everyone, and the places where today field touches your own chart specifically.

The Sun moves through a gate approximately every six days. Saturn takes two and a half years to travel the full wheel. Each planet brings its own quality to the gates it activates — the Sun brings conscious awareness, Saturn brings form and discipline, Jupiter brings expansion, the Moon cycles through the wheel every month.

You do not have to track all of this.

The practice is simpler: open your transits each morning. Notice what themes are active. Notice where they touch your own defined centers and channels. Choose one gesture for the day that honors what you are seeing — a conversation, a boundary, a creative act, rest.

Transits are a lens, not a law. They sharpen perception. They do not determine outcome.

What is the field showing you today?

visualBeats: Show the Today page Transits tab with active gate cards
Highlight collective weather versus natal contact language
Show one card becoming a daily reflection prompt
End on a simple action: conversation, boundary, work block, or rest
